title: The 10% Method Guide: The Golden Rule of Bankroll Management

ogTitle: Balanced Growth: 2026's Official Guide to the 10% Method
ogDescription: Don't just bet blindly. Our 2026 guide breaks down the 10% Method, showing you exactly how to manage your risk and stay in the green.
content:
FINANCIAL MASTERY 2026

The **10% Method** is the foundation of modern bankroll management. It is a 'Positive Progression' system designed with a single goal: **Consistent Growth.** The logic is simple yet powerful: betting exactly 10% of your current bankroll on every round ensures that when you win, your profit grows exponentially, and when you lose, your stake size decreases proportionally to protect your remaining funds. In 2026, while the house edge remains the same, the tools for executing a 10% Method—such as our Dice Simulator—have made it more accessible than ever for Canadian players.

How the 10% Method Works: The Mathematical Logic

Consider an even-money bet (like Baccarat or Roulette Red/Black) starting with a $1,000 initial bankroll:

  • **Round 1:** Bankroll $1,000 ⇒ Wager 10% ($100) ⇒ Win! New Bankroll: $1,100
  • **Round 2:** Bankroll $1,100 ⇒ Wager 10% ($110) ⇒ Win! New Bankroll: $1,210
  • **Round 3:** Bankroll $1,210 ⇒ Wager 10% ($121) ⇒ Lose! New Bankroll: $1,089
  • **Round 4:** Bankroll $1,089 ⇒ Wager 10% ($109) ⇒ ...

Regardless of the length of the win or loss streak, the 10% Method ensures that your stake size is always tuned to your current financial capacity. This 'safety net' is what makes the 10% Method so attractive to players who prioritize session stability over aggressive profit chasing.
